description: Offline observational astronomy: positions, rise/set, moon phases, eclipses, and seasons.
name: io.github.cyanheads/astronomy-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL

environmentVariables.description: Register the astronomy_get_ephemeris tool, which fetches small-body and spacecraft ephemerides from JPL Horizons. Off by default; the core is keyless and offline.
environmentVariables.name: ASTRONOMY_ENABLE_HORIZONS

environmentVariables.description: Register the astronomy_get_satellite_passes tool, which predicts visible satellite passes from CelesTrak TLEs propagated with SGP4. Off by default.
environmentVariables.name: ASTRONOMY_ENABLE_SATELLITES

environmentVariables.description: Fallback IANA timezone for observer-local output when a tool call omits `timezone`. Unset means UTC-only output.
environmentVariables.name: ASTRONOMY_DEFAULT_TIMEZONE
